claims.summary: The ESN uses prime-phased introspection and rank-1 covariance updates to observe recurrent spectral structure.
claims.disposition: verify existing source and ESN tests

claims.summary: Metal buffers are page-aligned and dimension metadata is typed correctly; v1 damping redistributes trace rather than silently erasing it.
Activating or retuning recurrent damping, including a 0.05 trial, would change the live spectral substrate.
claims.disposition: retain as bounded evidence and gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval plus GPU parity and rollback evidence
claims.authority: No recurrent damping, reservoir, or spectral control change is authorized.
